articles.title: Did you follow the local news this week? Take our Greater Boston news quiz.
articles.description:
A memorable meteor, a Hooters adieu, and a proud new Patriot are all part of this week’s news quiz.

The post Did you follow the local news this week? Take our Greater Boston news quiz. appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Meteor sighting reported across Greater Boston on June 5, 2026.
Hooters restaurant in Boston closes its doors after years of operation.
New England Patriots sign wide receiver AJ Brown, boosting local sports excitement.

articles.title: FIFA prohibits fans from bringing refillable water bottles into World Cup stadiums
articles.description:
"Naturally, the immediate thought from supporters is this is just the latest money grab."

The post FIFA prohibits fans from bringing refillable water bottles into World Cup stadiums appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: FIFA bans refillable water bottles at World Cup stadiums starting in 2026.
Boston fans may face higher costs for water during matches.
Local businesses could see increased sales from thirsty attendees.
